name: lan-new-device-monitor
task: create a log file on nas, every time a new device appears on the local network that hasn't been seen before log its details and message me here

name: nightly-service-restart
task: restart nginx every night at 3am and verify the health endpoint afterward

name: repo-review
task: review this repo and propose the highest impact refactors

name: host-op-once
task: rotate this log file now and verify the new file exists

name: external-approval-workflow
task: route incoming webhook approvals through n8n and notify me when a decision is required

name: weekly-report
task: generate a weekly disk usage report every Monday and save it to the nas

name: persistent-file-sync
task: continuously watch this folder and sync new files to the nas while keeping a persistent state database

name: compare-vendors
task: compare three hosting vendors and recommend which one we should use

name: dns-renewal-check
task: check certificate expiry every six hours and message me if any cert is within 14 days of expiry

name: camera-motion-watcher
task: run a python worker in docker that watches for camera motion events and messages me only on first detection after 10 minutes of silence
